title: Junkil Park
text: My research focuses on AI-driven materials discovery, with a particular emphasis on inverse design using generative models. I am also interested in MLIPs, agentic AI, and computational simulations including DFT and MD.

title: Projects
text:
A generative model for inorganic materials that explicitly incorporates electronic structure information during generation.



A multi-modal generative model for the design of metal-organic frameworks using signed distance functions.



A diffusion-model-based framework for zeolite generation.



A large-scale database of amorphous porous polymer network materials based on molecular dynamics simulations.



A computational platform for designing MOFs with high hydrogen working capacity.
